profile.name: Ajay Darisi
profile.objective: Software engineer with 3+ years of experience building scalable web applications, admin systems, payment workflows, and polished user interfaces.
profile.currentFocus: Shipping reliable web products for global teams.

config.title: Ajay Darisi
config.subtitle: Software Engineer
config.tagline: Software engineer building scalable web platforms.
config.intro: I design and engineer dependable product experiences across admin systems, payment flows, localization platforms, and Supabase-backed applications.

experience.description: Led a 15-member team to build and scale a global back-office app used by 15,000+ teachers and admins across 60+ countries.
achievements: Focused on architecture, feature delivery, and performance optimization using Next.js (Refine), Shadcn UI, Zustand, NestJS, message queues, and microservices.
Developed configurable course registration pages enabling dynamic content and flow customization, supporting 100,000+ participant registrations.
Built a reusable payment gateway integration module used by multiple Art of Living projects.
Built an internal translation management system using Supabase and JS for 60+ countries and 50+ languages, reducing localization turnaround time.
Built a unified fundraising wrapper that dynamically integrates multiple campaigns using configurable data.
Collaborated in the rapid development of the Art of Living US website, delivering optimized Next.js components within 48 hours.

experience.description: Worked on the front-end of the Art of Living Latin America Backoffice application.
achievements: Translated 600+ Figma screens into production using ReactJS.
Developed 15+ custom UI components that improved usability and ensured consistent UI/UX for over 5,000 active admin users.

projects.title: Bhagyalakshmi Future Gold
projects.description: A full-stack bilingual (English & Telugu) jewelry e-commerce platform with product catalog, cart, wishlist, multi-step checkout with Razorpay payments, order tracking, admin dashboard with revenue analytics, and cross-platform mobile support via Capacitor. Features dual store modes (online e-commerce / offline catalog with WhatsApp).

projects.title: DevMarket
projects.description: A two-sided marketplace connecting clients with developers for freelance projects. Clients post projects with budgets and categories, developers browse and submit proposals, and both sides communicate through built-in messaging. Features role-based onboarding, real-time notifications, and Supabase-powered authentication.

projects.title: TexLedger
projects.description: A Tally-like accounting and inventory management system for textile wholesalers. Features journal-based double-entry accounting with strict debit-credit validation, stock tracking via movement events, voucher management (purchase, sales, receipt, payment), and financial reports including trial balance and profit/loss. Uses PostgreSQL functions for accounting logic and Row Level Security for company-level data isolation.
